payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark reddish-brown varnished wooden nightstand top with a rectangular beveled edge, visible wear and scuffs on the front corner, glossy finish with light reflections, and a couple of small decorative coasters on the surface; estimated distance to camera ≈0.6 m.
